data.title: James Wynn's 10x SUI long position has a floating loss of $700,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, due to the continuous decline of SUI, James Wynn's 10x SUI long order has a floating loss of US$700,000, becoming his only losing position in Hyperliquid. In the past 20 minutes, he has added US$4 million. The current position is as follows: 
-Position size: 4853135.59 SUI, about US$18.58 million
-Opening price: US$3.97064
-Current floating loss: US$700,000

data.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Allocates 500 BTC to Two Prime to Expand Profit Strategy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin mining company MARA Holdings announced that it has expanded its cooperation with SEC-registered Bitcoin investment advisor Two Prime, and will allocate 500 BTC (from its 48,137 BTC reserves) to its managed income strategy. Two Prime has previously provided MARA with a Bitcoin-backed loan. MARA plans to further expand its Bitcoin holdings through a $2 billion stock offering. Two Prime creates returns for institutional investors through customized Bitcoin derivatives strategies and has $2.5 billion in capital. (The Block)

data.title: Kraken to Offer Over 50 Tokenized Stocks and ETFs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to market news: Cryptocurrency exchange Kraken will provide more than 50 tokenized stocks and ETFs, covering stocks of companies such as Apple, Tesla, and Nvidia.

data.title: Sui Network Faces $200 Million Theft Challenge
data.description: According to Odaily, SlowMist's Cosine reported on the X platform that approximately $200 million was stolen from the Sui Network's Cetus. The hackers face difficulties in converting the stolen funds into more stable assets and transferring them across networks. Some traces of the hackers have already been obtained.

data.title: SlowMist Cosine: We have obtained some traces of Cetus hackers
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: SlowMist Yuxian posted on the X platform that about $200 million was stolen from Cetus on the Sui network. It is not easy for hackers to convert it into more stable assets and then take it all away. Some traces of the hackers have been obtained.

data.title: Bitget has launched U-based TGT and BLUE perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Bitget announced that it has launched U-based TGT and BLUE perpetual contracts, with leverage ranges of 1-20 times, and contract trading BOT will be opened simultaneously.

data.title: Exploring the Role of Staking in Blockchain Systems
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, staking is emerging as a pivotal mechanism in modern blockchain systems, offering a self-sustaining financial model that rewards positive behavior rather than relying on energy consumption. This concept was explored in a recent episode of The Clear Crypto Podcast, where hosts Gareth Jenkinson and Nathan Jeffay discussed the intricacies of staking with Noam Nisan from StarkWare. Nisan, a principal researcher and esteemed computer scientist, delved into the mechanics of staking, emphasizing its role in maintaining blockchain integrity through volunteer operators. By staking their assets, these operators demonstrate their commitment to the network, which in turn incentivizes them with tokens for their participation.

Staking provides two primary forms of security: computer science-based assurances and economic deterrents against malicious actions. Nisan explained that if a significant portion of the staked participants act appropriately, the system's correctness can be mathematically proven. Additionally, there is an economic safeguard; if operators were to compromise the system, the value of their staked tokens would likely diminish, resulting in financial loss for them. This dual-layer security framework underscores the robustness of staking as a mechanism for blockchain governance.

The podcast also touched upon the ongoing debate between proof-of-work (PoW) and proof-of-stake (PoS) systems. Jenkinson, known for his support of Bitcoin, raised the question of preference between the two. Nisan responded by highlighting that the choice between PoW and PoS is fundamentally a social issue, with each system presenting its own set of trade-offs concerning cost, control, and decentralization. The discussion further explored how staking influences tokenomics and system architecture, with Nisan explaining how mechanisms like fee structures and inflation controls, such as Ethereum's minting curve, contribute to maintaining ecosystem equilibrium.

Listeners interested in a deeper understanding of staking and its implications for blockchain technology can access the full conversation on The Clear Crypto Podcast, available on Cointelegraph’s Podcasts page, Apple Podcasts, and Spotify. The episode offers valuable insights into the evolving landscape of blockchain systems and the critical role staking plays in their operation and security.

data.title: Bluefin Temporarily Halts Operations Following Cetus Attack
data.description: According to PANews, in response to the Cetus attack, Sui ecosystem decentralized exchange (DEX) Bluefin announced on the X platform that it has temporarily suspended operations on Bluefin Spot as a precautionary measure to ensure user safety. The platform emphasized that Bluefin remains completely secure, and the team is actively monitoring the situation.

data.title: a16z Crypto proposes a strategy to protect crypto assets after data breaches, emphasizing the importance of ZK technology
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News a16z Crypto published an article discussing strategies for protecting crypto assets after data breaches, emphasizing the key role of zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) technology in enhancing user privacy and security, and pointing out that ZKP allows users to verify information without exposing sensitive data, thereby protecting privacy while meeting compliance requirements.
a16z Crypto recommends that developers implement mechanisms including deposit and withdrawal screening and selective deanonymization at the protocol level to prevent illegal capital inflows and improve regulatory transparency. It also emphasizes that ZKP technology can achieve compliance verification of on-chain activities without sacrificing user privacy, providing stronger security for the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Binance: Users who successfully received TGT have been distributed an additional 440 TGT tokens airdropped
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance announced that for users who have successfully received TGT, the platform has distributed an additional airdrop of 440 TGT tokens.

data.title: Strategies for Protecting Crypto Assets After Data Breaches
data.description:
According to Odaily, a16z Crypto has published an article discussing strategies to protect crypto assets following data breaches. The article highlights the critical role of zero-knowledge proof (ZKP) technology in enhancing user privacy and security. ZKP allows users to verify information without exposing sensitive data, thereby protecting privacy while meeting compliance requirements.

a16z Crypto suggests that developers implement mechanisms at the protocol level, such as deposit and withdrawal screening and selective de-anonymization, to prevent the inflow of illegal funds and improve regulatory transparency. The article emphasizes that ZKP technology can ensure compliance verification of on-chain activities without compromising user privacy, providing stronger security for the crypto ecosystem.

data.title: Hong Kong Advances Virtual Asset and Gold Markets Amid Legislative Efforts
data.description: According to Odaily, Hong Kong's Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Xu Zhengyu, announced that the city is actively developing its virtual asset market alongside its gold commodity market. Hong Kong aims to innovate in new financial sectors, including fintech, virtual assets, stablecoins, and green finance. This week, efforts will be made to secure legislative support for establishing a regulatory framework for stablecoins, addressing significant market demand. The next steps involve continuous innovation and expansion into new markets.

data.title: Cybersecurity firm SecureTech announces plans to build a Bitcoin treasury reserve
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Web3 solutions and cybersecurity company SecureTech released a 2025 strategic plan update, which disclosed that the company expects revenue to reach $10 million in fiscal year 2025. In addition, it will establish a Bitcoin treasury reserve plan, including digital asset acquisitions and Web3 innovation strategies, and continue to evaluate acquisitions and investment opportunities in the blockchain and fintech fields. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Xu Zhengyu: There is a great demand for stablecoins in Hong Kong, and the virtual asset and gold commodity markets will be developed simultaneously
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong Financial Services and Treasury Bureau Director Paul Hui said that Hong Kong is currently developing the virtual asset market and the gold commodity market at the same time. Hong Kong will open up new financial fields, including financial technology, virtual assets, stablecoins and green finance. This week, it will soon seek the support of the Legislative Council to establish a legal regulatory framework for stablecoins. There is also a great demand in the market for this aspect, so the next step must be to continue to innovate and expand new markets. (Hong Kong Special Administrative Region Government News Release)

data.title: Bitwise: US stablecoin bill may trigger a long-term bull market, and assets such as ETH and SOL may benefit
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitwise Asset Management pointed out in its latest report that the advancement of stablecoin legislation in the United States may become one of the most important regulatory events in the history of the crypto industry, and is expected to trigger a crypto bull market that will last for several years. Matt Hougan, the company's chief investment officer, said that the importance of this legislation may even exceed the Bitcoin spot ETF approved in January 2024. Bitwise believes that if the bill is passed, the assets that benefit the most may include Ethereum (ETH), Solana, Uniswap and Aave. The bill received a final vote in the Senate on Monday and is expected to become the first crypto legislation in the United States in the summer. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Bitcoin project Roxom Global completes $17.9 million financing, with Borderless Capital and others participating
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin project Roxom Global is building a BTC-denominated exchange and a 24/7 media network RoxomTV that is completely dedicated to the development of Bitcoin. It is reported that Draper Associates, Borderless Capital, ego death and Kingsway Capital have invested $7.9 million in its exchange and raised $10 million for RoxomTV in a round of private financing. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Sui Ecosystem DEX Bluefin: Spot trading services have been suspended for security reasons, the platform remains safe
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sui Ecological Decentralized Trading Platform Bluefin announced on the X platform: "In order to ensure user safety, we have taken precautionary measures and temporarily suspended Bluefin spot trading services. It should be emphasized that the Bluefin platform is always in a completely safe state. Our team is closely monitoring the situation. Thank you for your trust."

data.title: Sonic Labs Partners with Crypto Trading Firm GSR to Drive Liquidity Growth
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Sonic Labs announced a partnership with crypto trading company GSR, which will provide liquidity support as a market maker for S tokens. GSR has licenses from the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) and the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) of the United Kingdom. In the future, it will participate in liquidity deployment, early project support and token launch guidance in the Sonic DeFi ecosystem. GSR also previously sponsored the Sonic Summit held in Vienna in 2025.
